name: Peanut Butter and Jelly French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread peanut butter on six slices of bread.
2. Spread jelly on the other six slices of bread.
3. Put one slice of each together to form sandwiches.
4. In a mixing bowl, lightly beat eggs.
5. Add milk and salt, then mix together.
6. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Dip sandwiches in egg mixture, coating well.
8. Place in skillet and brown both sides.
9. Serve immediately
